settings.title: Cleanse skin
settings.text: Start with clean, dry skin so the formula can sit evenly as the final step in your routine.

settings.title: Apply product
settings.text: Apply a thin, even layer across the face, avoiding the eye area.

settings.title: Massage in
settings.text: Gently smooth outward using light pressure until the texture feels comfortable on skin.

settings.title: Sleep and glow
settings.text: Leave it on overnight and wake up to skin that feels softer, fresher, and more hydrated.

settings.title: Hydrating complex
settings.text: Supports a soft, plump feel and helps improve the look of dry, tired skin.

settings.title: Glow support
settings.text: Helps the complexion appear smoother, fresher, and more luminous.

settings.text: Designed to support skin comfort while you rest overnight.

settings.question: How do I use this product?
settings.answer: Apply it as the final step in your nighttime routine after cleansing and skincare. Use a thin, even layer and leave it on overnight.

settings.question: Is it suitable for sensitive skin?
settings.answer: Always patch test first if your skin is sensitive. If irritation occurs, stop use and consult a skincare professional.

settings.question: When will I see results?
settings.answer: Many customers notice softer-feeling skin quickly, while visible improvements may depend on your skin type and routine consistency.
